title: LibrarySettings
description: LibrarySettings: Settings object to be used by the Library_Engine for controling Dataset extraction.

UserLibraryPaths.description: List of folder paths to user-specified folder paths to be used by the Library_Engine when extracting Datasets.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
